ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chemical_substances" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical substance */,
  "pmnno" TEXT /* PMN number for the chemical */,
  "accno" INTEGER /* ACC number for the chemical */,
  "generic_name" TEXT /* Generic name of the chemical substance */,
  "fl" TEXT /* FL code for the chemical */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the chemical substance */,
  "molecular_weight" TEXT /* Molecular weight of the chemical substance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical substance */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the registration was submitted */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review process */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemical_substances ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chemical family */,
  "parent_family_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent chemical family (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical substance */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the property value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manufacturer, reviewer, public information officer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the registration */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES registrations ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submitters" (
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submitter */,
  "submitter_name" TEXT /* Full name of the submitter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the submitter */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the submitter represents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submitter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submission_logs" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical substance */,
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submitter */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the submission was made */,
  "submission_type" TEXT /* Type of submission (e.g., new registration, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submission_logs_submitter_id FOREIGN KEY ("submitter_id") REFERENCES submitters ("submitter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submission_logs_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemical_substances ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical substance */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual report, compliance report) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemical_substances ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "export_data" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical substance */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date the data was exported */,
  "export_type" TEXT /* Type of export (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the exported data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_export_data_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemical_substances ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_family_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical substance */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_family_memberships_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemical_substances ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_family_memberships_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES chemical_families ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_properties_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical property */,
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submitter */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the property */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_properties_history_submitter_id FOREIGN KEY ("submitter_id") REFERENCES submitters ("submitter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_properties_history_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES chemical_properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "export_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "substance_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical substance */,
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the submitter */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "field_changed" TEXT /* Name of the field changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substance_history_submitter_id FOREIGN KEY ("submitter_id") REFERENCES submitters ("submitter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substance_history_chemical_id FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_id") REFERENCES chemical_substances ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
